title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at MagicBricks

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
MagicBricks has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
